title: Rubi
description: Enables the display of furigana/ruby annotations in Minecraft.
body:
# Rubi

Rubi is a utility mod for Minecraft that, hopefully, will enable you to more easily learn (for example) Japanese words through gameplay by allowing the display of [furigana/ruby annotations](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ruby_character) within the game itself. Additionally, I created/generated a dedicated resource pack to provide compatible ruby annotations for the Japanese language. While the resource pack is fairly comprehensive, please note that I haven't thoroughly verified every annotation (there are a _lot_ of them), so I should expect there to be some inaccuracies.

> **NOTE:** This mod does basically nothing without a compatible language resource pack.

## How do I make my own annotations?

See the section "For resource pack creators". The same notation can be copy-pasted into books and signs.

## Options

By default, ruby annotations are displayed above the annotated text. This can be changed in the game's accessibility settings. There are four options:

- **Above Text** (Default): The ruby annotations are displayed above the annotated text.
- **Below Text**: The ruby annotations are displayed below the annotated text.
- **Replace Text**: The annotated text is replaced with the ruby annotations.
- **Hidden**: Self explanatory.

## Compatible resource packs

### Japanese

- [Furigana](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furigana) by [keve1227](https://github.com/keve1227) (me)

## For resource pack creators

Due to Modrinth not supporting <ruby>rubies<rt>ˈɹuːbiːz</rt></ruby>, this section is best viewed on Github. [See the README.](https://github.com/keve1227/rubi/blob/main/README.md#for-resource-pack-creators)
